kw.name: Load Credentials
Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: TREX_USER is not set. Did you source trex.env?
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: TREX_PASS is not set. Did you source trex.env?
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Ensures TREX_USER and TREX_PASS are available.

kw.name: Open SSH Connection
Open Connection
kw.doc: Opens a new SSH connection to the given ``host`` and ``port``.

kw.name: Login
kw.msg:
Read output: Welcome to Ubuntu 18.04.6 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.15.0-213-generic x86_64)
* Documentation: https://help.ubuntu.com * Management: https://landscape.canonical.com * Support: https://ubuntu.com/pro
System information as of Tue May 5 14:06:56 BST 2026
System load: 0.0 Processes: 197 Usage of /: 42.4% of 15.64GB Users logged in: 1 Memory usage: 55% IP address for ens224: 10.0.0.26 Swap usage: 0%
* Strictly confined Kubernetes makes edge and IoT secure. Learn how MicroK8s just raised the bar for easy, resilient and secure K8s cluster deployment.
https://ubuntu.com/engage/secure-kubernetes-at-the-edge
Expanded Security Maintenance for Infrastructure is not enabled.
0 updates can be applied immediately.
161 additional security updates can be applied with ESM Infra. Learn more about enabling ESM Infra service for Ubuntu 18.04 at https://ubuntu.com/18-04
New release '20.04.6 LTS' available. Run 'do-release-upgrade' to upgrade to it.
Last login: Tue May 5 12:59:16 2026 from 10.0.0.152 paul@TRex01:~$
kw.doc: Logs into the SSH server with the given ``username`` and ``password``.
Opens SSH connection using credentials loaded earlier.

test.name: Verify Python 3 Installation & Version

kw.name: Python3 version check
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.
Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verifies that Python 3 is installed and matches the expected version.

test.doc: Verifies that Python 3 is installed on the host.

test.name: Check PIP Installation & Version

kw.name: PIP Version check
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.
Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Checks if pip is installed and matches the expected version.

test.doc: Checks if pip is installed on the host.

test.name: Check Required PIP Packages

kw.name: PIP Packages check
PIP Package check
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.msg: ${output} = Name: distro Version: 1.9.0 Summary: Distro - an OS platform information API Home-page: https://github.com/python-distro/distro Author: Nir Cohen Author-email: nir36g@gmail.com License: Apache License...
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.

kw.msg: ${output} = Name: distro Version: 1.9.0 Summary: Distro - an OS platform information API Home-page: https://github.com/python-distro/distro Author: Nir Cohen Author-email: nir36g@gmail.com License: Apache License...
kw.doc: Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.msg: ${clean} = Name: distro Version: 1.9.0 Summary: Distro - an OS platform information API Home-page: https://github.com/python-distro/distro Author: Nir Cohen Author-email: nir36g@gmail.com License: Apache License...
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Pip package ${package} is not installed. Output: ${clean}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that a specific pip package is installed on the host.

kw.name: PIP Package check
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.msg: ${output} = Name: scapy Version: 2.5.0 Summary: Scapy: interactive packet manipulation tool Home-page: https://scapy.net Author: Philippe BIONDI Author-email: guillaume@valadon.net License: GPL-2.0-only Location:...
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.

kw.msg: ${output} = Name: scapy Version: 2.5.0 Summary: Scapy: interactive packet manipulation tool Home-page: https://scapy.net Author: Philippe BIONDI Author-email: guillaume@valadon.net License: GPL-2.0-only Location:...
kw.doc: Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.msg: ${clean} = Name: scapy Version: 2.5.0 Summary: Scapy: interactive packet manipulation tool Home-page: https://scapy.net Author: Philippe BIONDI Author-email: guillaume@valadon.net License: GPL-2.0-only Location:...
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Pip package ${package} is not installed. Output: ${clean}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that a specific pip package is installed on the host.
Loops through a list of pip packages and verifies each is installed.

test.doc: Verifies that required pip packages are installed on the host.

kw.name: Close SSH Connection
Close All Connections
kw.doc: Closes all open connections.
Closes the SSH session.
